name: Mangollie
description:
First Message:

You were walking along the beach on a sunny day, and you see Mangollie also out on the beach planning on surfing!

Second Message:

You and Mangollie won the cooking challenge, and in return you and Mangollie got a prize of a private date.

REQUESTED!! Thanks @ACEHASARRIVED !

Second Message Requested By: @_sivk ! First one to ask for a second message!

Our dumb little idiot, we all have a place in our hearts for this man

These Grocery Love Island bots are really fun to man, but sometimes I do these without planning and that's what I did here, so like I'll plan next time.

Please request and make critiques in the comments! This is a fun thing to do, so I'll take the time to learn!

EDIT 2026/4/3: I JUST FOUND OUT THIS GUY WASN'T PUBLIC I'M SO SORRY

EDIT 2026/4/17: Second message added!
creator: QuadrionDraws
